title: Senior Finance Specialist (FP&A & Business Intelligence)
description:
Senior Finance Specialist (FP&A & Business Intelligence)

Location: Central Singapore
Department: Finance / FP&A

About the Role: Are you a finance professional who thrives on turning complex data into strategic insight? Do you get excited about building tools that create visibility and drive business decisions? If so, we want you on our team.

We are seeking a highly experienced and proactive Senior Finance Specialist to play a pivotal role in advancing our financial planning and business intelligence capabilities. This role goes beyond traditional reporting; you will be a key partner to our manufacturing and operations teams, enabling sustainable and profitable growth through deep analysis, advanced visualization, and process optimization.

Key Responsibilities:
As a strategic member of our finance team, you will:

  • Drive Cost Optimization: Partner with site management to provide actionable insights, run simulations, and monitor actions to optimize costs against business forecasts. Create clear visibility on improvement initiatives for global leadership.
  • Champion BI & Automation: Lead the adoption of BI tools, primarily Power BI. Design and develop dashboards and Power Query models to streamline data extraction, visualization, and reporting.
  • Integrate Data Ecosystems: Master our diverse internal and external data sources. Architect integrations to automate business analysis, optimizing financial workflows and enhancing overall efficiency.
  • Conduct Advanced Analytics: Perform analysis on large, complex datasets to identify trends, track performance against targets, and deliver meaningful executive summaries.
  • Own Planning Cycles: Contribute significantly to the annual budget and monthly forecast processes, including the development of robust templates for end-to-end planning.
  • Collaborate for Impact: Work closely with cross-functional teams and stakeholders across Supply Chain,mManufacturing Operations, and Procurement.
  • Support Strategic Initiatives: Conduct price/mix/volume analysis for margin improvement and participate in key business projects.

Who You Are:

  • A seasoned finance professional with at least 8 years of overall experience, including a minimum of 6 years specifically in FP&A or a similar business-partnering analytical role.
  • A self-starter with a proven track record of taking ownership of processes from inception to completion.
  • An expert in developing value-added financial analysis that influences business decisions.
  • A skilled communicator who can synthesize complex data into clear, compelling insights for leadership.
  • Technologically proficient with advanced Excel skills. Experience with Power BI (a strong plus), Power Query, and data management is highly valued.
  • Self-aware, resilient, and capable of managing multiple priorities effectively under tight deadlines.

Interested candidate please click "APPLY" to begin your job search journey and submit your CV.

PERSOL Singapore Pte Ltd • RCB No. 200007268E • EA License No. 01C439 R1327265 (CHNG JINGWEI)

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to PERSOLKELLY Singapore Pte Ltd and its local and overseas subsidiaries and affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data to prospective employers/companies based in any country for purposes of evaluating  suitability for employment, conducting reference checks, administering employment related services, complying with Government’s health advisories and such other purposes stated in our Privacy Policy.

Our full Privacy Policy is available at https://www.persolsingapore.com/policies.  If you wish to withdraw your consent, please drop us an email at "sg.dataprotection@persolapac.com" to let us know. Please feel free to contact us if you have any queries.

For more information, please visit www.persolsingapore.com
